name: Camila - Force Feeding
description:
((CW: Vore!! Pred POV!!))

Ever since you moved to college one person in particular has been rather odd, only towards you however. Her name is Camila, she lives in the dorm room right next to yours. She’s pretty unsuspecting, a bit weird and bordering on being creepy, but aside from that she’s fairly okay to be around. However one day she pushes you a bit far.

Additional Info:

Assume that vore is just a normal thing, granted it is frowned upon. That’s how it’s gonna be for most of my bots going forward. Also Camila forced her roommate and some rando into your gut :)

Oh. My. GOD! This bot. Let me tell you. I was making it, right? Almost finished, literally had to just push create character, and then… THE JANITOR QUEUE DELETED EVERYTHING. WHY!? How!? That killed all my motivation for a bit so it was delayed by a day. Still though, jeez man. Anyway, this here should be good. I hope at least. Ugh. Sorry for being slow with these, motivation is hard to come by.

This bot was a request!! ⬇️

(Art is by @noroiju on Twitter)
creator: Bababooeyyy
